operations.summary: Resolve a BWB law to its toestand on a specific date
operations.description: Returns the toestand in force on the given date, plus its consolidated PDF, amendment PDFs (Stb/Stcrt/Trb publications), previous/next toestand pointers, and an aggregate versions count. Use this instead of /versions when you only need a single time-resolved version, not the whole history.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) to resolve against. Required.

WettenOverheidNlBwbAtResponse.description: Toestand-resolved-by-date envelope for a BWB law

date.description: Date the response was resolved for (ISO YYYY-MM-DD)

pdf.description: Consolidated PDF for this toestand; absent if not yet rendered

amendmentPdfs.description: Amendment PDFs (Stb/Stcrt/Trb publications) that contributed to this toestand

previousToestandId.description: ID of the temporally-preceding toestand; null at the start of coverage

nextToestandId.description: ID of the temporally-following toestand; null at the end of coverage

WettenOverheidNlBwbToestand.description: A single time-effective version of a BWB law

validFrom.description: ISO date this toestand came into force

validTo.description: ISO date this toestand stops being in force; null if open-ended

textUrl.description: cdx-nl:// URL to fetch this toestand's text

WettenOverheidNlBwbAttachmentRef.description: Reference to a PDF attachment hosted on the BWB document

WettenOverheidNlBwbVersionsCount.description: Aggregate pointer to the versions endpoint

total.description: Total number of toestanden for this document

url.description: cdx-nl:// URL to enumerate all versions
